Writing

Notes

Short explainers and study writeups on topics I'm exploring. Written primarily for my own understanding — like Gilles Castel-style notes but in Typst. If you want to learn Typst syntax, try my Typstnique game.

Currently studying

  • Knowledge Representation & Reasoning (A(RC), propositional logic, FOL)
  • Optimisation — KKT conditions, Lagrangian duality
  • AI safety & interpretability
KKT Conditions — A Quick Primer 1 Jun 2026

The Karush–Kuhn–Tucker conditions generalise Lagrange multipliers to inequality constraints. Here's an intuitive breakdown.

optimisationKKTcalculus
